visual_description: A man in glasses and a suit is seen in profile, looking toward the right side of the frame, with another man partially visible beside him. Both are standing in a dimly lit, nighttime outdoor setting with blurred green lights in the background. The man in glasses maintains a steady gaze forward, while the other man’s face is turned away and less distinct.
audio_description: The audio features a single, high-pitched, breathy voice speaking rapidly with a noticeable gasp.
